options.text: I worked on it with my team and we had a lot of fun.
I developed a new model that improved prediction accuracy by 22% compared to existing methods.
I think the topic is interesting and many people care about it.
I just helped with formatting the references and editing the grammar.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体数据（22%）和明确的贡献描述（developed a new model），符合‘用数据支撑成就’的要求。其他选项空泛（fun, interesting）、过于谦卑（仅做格式编辑）或缺乏实质性贡献，不符合学术面试中展示能力的要求。
content.speakerText: I saw you published a paper in the Journal of Environmental Science. Can you tell me what your main contribution was?
content.speakerTextCn: 我看到你在《环境科学期刊》发表过论文，能说说你的主要贡献吗？

options.text: It was really hard, but I just kept going.
My data was inconsistent, so I redesigned the sampling protocol and consulted two experts to validate the results.
I didn't have enough time because I had too many classes.
The lab was too noisy, so I moved to the library.

content.explanation: 正确答案清晰描述了挑战（数据不一致）、采取的具体行动（重设计采样协议）和资源利用（咨询专家），体现解决问题的能力。选项1缺乏具体行动，选项3和4是外部环境问题而非研究核心挑战，不符合面试官考察科研韧性与主动性的意图。
content.speakerText: What was the biggest challenge you faced during your research, and how'd you overcome it?
content.speakerTextCn: 研究中你遇到的最大挑战是什么？怎么解决的？
